creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
with the following patch, I get past this linkage failure:

--- hotspot/src/share/vm/prims/nativeLookup.cpp.orig    2013-09-06 18:22:15 UTC
+++ hotspot/src/share/vm/prims/nativeLookup.cpp
@@ -60,7 +60,10 @@ static void mangle_name_on(outputStream*
   while (bytes < end_bytes) {
     jchar c;
     bytes = UTF8::next(bytes, &c);
-    if (c <= 0x7f && isalnum(c)) {
+    if (c <= 0x7f &&
+          ((c >= 'A' && c <= 'Z') ||
+           (c >= 'a' && c <= 'z') ||
+           (c >= '0' && c <= '9'))) {
       st->put((char) c);
     } else {
            if (c == '_') st->print("_1");

however, I now hit a new problem:
Error occurred during initialization of VM
java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Null charset name
	at java.nio.charset.Charset.lookup(Charset.java:460)
	at java.nio.charset.Charset.isSupported(Charset.java:510)
	at java.io.UnixFileSystem.getBooleanAttributes0(Native Method)
	at java.io.UnixFileSystem.getBooleanAttributes(UnixFileSystem.java:242)
	at java.io.File.exists(File.java:813)
	at java.lang.ClassLoader$3.run(ClassLoader.java:1904)
	at java.security.AccessController.doPrivileged(Native Method)
	at java.lang.ClassLoader.loadLibrary1(ClassLoader.java:1901)
	at java.lang.ClassLoader.loadLibrary0(ClassLoader.java:1890)
	at java.lang.ClassLoader.loadLibrary(ClassLoader.java:1872)
	at java.lang.Runtime.loadLibrary0(Runtime.java:849)
	at java.lang.System.loadLibrary(System.java:1088)
	at java.lang.System.initializeSystemClass(System.java:1149)

*** Error code 1

the working patch has been updated by appending version 2:
https://www.dragonflybsd.org/~marino/patch-fix-openjdk7-locales_3.txt
